'''bofadaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:rubber|rubber]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-f-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rubber|rubber]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| bofadaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:bofadithi|bofadithi]] || [[word:bofadiji|bofadiji]] || [[word:bofadishi|bofadishi]] || [[word:bofadiki|bofadiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:bofaduthuthu|bofaduthuthu]] || [[word:bofadujuju|bofadujuju]] || [[word:bofadushushu|bofadushushu]] || [[word:bofadukuku|bofadukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:bofaduthu|bofaduthu]] || [[word:bofaduju|bofaduju]] || [[word:bofadushu|bofadushu]] || [[word:bofaduku|bofaduku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:bofadufthuf|bofadufthuf]] || [[word:bofadufjuf|bofadufjuf]] || [[word:bofadufshuf|bofadufshuf]] || [[word:bofadufkuf|bofadufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:bofadethe|bofadethe]] || [[word:bofadeje|bofadeje]] || [[word:bofadeshe|bofadeshe]] || [[word:bofadeke|bofadeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:bofadothotho|bofadothotho]] || [[word:bofadojojo|bofadojojo]] || [[word:bofadoshosho|bofadoshosho]] || [[word:bofadokoko|bofadokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:bofadotho|bofadotho]] || [[word:bofadojo|bofadojo]] || [[word:bofadosho|bofadosho]] || [[word:bofadoko|bofadoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:bofadofthof|bofadofthof]] || [[word:bofadofjof|bofadofjof]] || [[word:bofadofshof|bofadofshof]] || [[word:bofadofkof|bofadofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:bofadÃŸfthÃŸf|bofadÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:bofadÃŸfjÃŸf|bofadÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:bofadÃŸfshÃŸf|bofadÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:bofadÃŸfkÃŸf|bofadÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:bofadÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|bofadÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:bofadÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|bofadÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:bofadÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|bofadÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:bofadÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|bofadÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:bofadÃŸfthÃŸf|bofadÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:bofadÃŸfjÃŸf|bofadÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:bofadÃŸfshÃŸf|bofadÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:bofadÃŸfkÃŸf|bofadÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:bofadÃŸfthÃŸf|bofadÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:bofadÃŸfjÃŸf|bofadÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:bofadÃŸfshÃŸf|bofadÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:bofadÃŸfkÃŸf|bofadÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:bofadÃḊthÃḊ|bofadÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:bofadÃḊjÃḊ|bofadÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:bofadÃḊshÃḊ|bofadÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:bofadÃḊkÃḊ|bofadÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:bofadathatha|bofadathatha]] || [[word:bofadajaja|bofadajaja]] || [[word:bofadashasha|bofadashasha]] || [[word:bofadakaka|bofadakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:bofadatha|bofadatha]] || [[word:bofadaja|bofadaja]] || [[word:bofadasha|bofadasha]] || [[word:bofadaka|bofadaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:bofadafthaf|bofadafthaf]] || [[word:bofadafjaf|bofadafjaf]] || [[word:bofadafshaf|bofadafshaf]] || [[word:bofadafkaf|bofadafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:bofadasha|bofadasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:bofadshÃḋsha|bofadshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bofadrosha|bofadrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bofadmusha|bofadmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:bofadyasha|bofadyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobofadnkshÃḋsha|gobofadnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobofadnkrosha|gobofadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobofadnkmusha|gobofadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobofadnkyasha|gobofadnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:bofafadasha|bofafadasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:bofafadshÃḋsha|bofafadshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bofafadrosha|bofafadrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bofafadmusha|bofafadmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:bofafadyasha|bofafadyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobofafadnkshÃḋsha|gobofafadnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobofafadnkrosha|gobofafadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobofafadnkmusha|gobofafadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobofafadnkyasha|gobofafadnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:befÃḊdasha|befÃḊdasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:befÃḊdshÃḋsha|befÃḊdshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:befÃḊdrosha|befÃḊdrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:befÃḊdmusha|befÃḊdmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:befÃḊdyasha|befÃḊdyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobefÃḊdnkshÃḋsha|gobefÃḊdnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobefÃḊdnkrosha|gobefÃḊdnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobefÃḊdnkmusha|gobefÃḊdnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobefÃḊdnkyasha|gobefÃḊdnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:bofadasha|bofadasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:bofadshÃḋsha|bofadshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bofadrosha|bofadrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bofadmusha|bofadmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:bofadyasha|bofadyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobofadnkshÃḋsha|gobofadnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobofadnkrosha|gobofadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobofadnkmusha|gobofadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobofadnkyasha|gobofadnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
